subcodes.title: Address to the Baha'is at Rauscher's Hall in Washington, 1912-11-09
subcodes.first_line: I feel a keen sense of joy in being present at this banquet this evening, for -- praise be to God!
subcodes.subjects: @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @unity; oneness of humanity, @universal peace; world unity, @apostles; early disciples of Christ, @disregarding individual capacity; weakness
